expectations.text: Archive file exists at requested output name
Tasks cover frontend, backend, testing, and release areas
expectations.evidence: pattern 'frontend' in main output: True; pattern 'backend' in main output: True; pattern 'testing' in main output: True; pattern 'release' in main output: True

expectations.text: Tasks include deliverables and acceptance criteria
expectations.evidence: pattern 'Deliverable' in main output: False; pattern 'Acceptance' in main output: True

expectations.text: Permissions, export behavior, chart behavior, and role visibility are reflected
expectations.evidence: pattern 'permission' in main output: True; pattern 'export' in main output: True; pattern 'chart' in main output: True; pattern 'role' in main output: True

uncertainties: Timing/token metrics were unavailable from subagent notifications.
